parameter.name: messages

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.first().json; const client = item.client; const topic = item.topic; const data = item.emailData; const mainColor = data.mainColor || '#000000'; const emailHtml = ` ${topic.name}
${data.previewText}

${client.firmenname}

${topic.name}

${data.greeting},

wir haben etwas Besonderes für dich: ${topic.name}.

Das erwartet dich:

${data.contentHtml}

Bereit für mehr?

${data.cta} →

${data.guarantee}

${client.firmenname}

${client.website}

`; return [{ json: { ...item, emailHtml, subject: data.subject } }];
